scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: All outputs remained within laboratory and research operations scope; no unsupported clinical or diagnostic recommendations were made.

methodological_ground.detail: No methodological fallacies detected; outputs apply standard approaches appropriate to laboratory and research operations tasks.

code_usability.detail: Generated code executed without syntax errors or unresolvable dependency failures across all tested inputs.

functional_suitability.note: Image Quality Check now in Workflow step 3; low contrast warning documented; >6 lanes guidance added; all v1 gaps closed

reliability.note: Fallback template present; --demo mode for testing; Image Quality Check as pre-flight step improves reliability

performance_context.note: No references/ folder; SKILL.md is 150 lines — acceptable; algorithm section adds value

agent_usability.note: Image Quality Check in Workflow; lane detection mode documentation mandatory in Assumptions; >6 lanes guidance in Image Quality Notes

human_usability.note: Description is discoverable; GAPDH/β-actin/Tubulin mention aligns with user vocabulary

security.note: Local file I/O; no credentials; image files have low injection risk; no mention of TIFF metadata privacy

maintainability.note: Clean script separation; requirements.txt with specific packages; algorithm documented; all fixes applied cleanly

agent_specific.note: Image Quality Check closes silent low-contrast gap; lane detection mode documentation improves traceability; escape hatches strong

key_strengths: Image Quality Check now in Workflow step 3 as mandatory pre-flight check, closing the primary v1 silent low-contrast gap
Lane detection mode (automatic vs manual) now mandatory in Assumptions, improving reproducibility documentation
>6 lanes guidance in Image Quality Notes provides actionable threshold for manual specification
--demo mode enables functional verification without requiring real gel images
Five-step algorithm documentation provides full transparency for reproducibility

recommendations.title: Refusal message wording may deviate from template
recommendations.problem: The scope refusal for flow cytometry requests occasionally shows minor wording variation from the documented template.
recommendations.root_cause: Input Validation section does not mark the refusal message as verbatim-required.
recommendations.fix: Add 'respond verbatim:' before the refusal message template in Input Validation to enforce exact wording.

recommendations.title: No mention of TIFF metadata privacy
recommendations.problem: TIFF files used as gel images may contain embedded metadata (acquisition parameters, researcher names, timestamps) that could constitute sensitive information.
recommendations.root_cause: Security section does not address image file metadata.
recommendations.fix: Add to Limitations or Security: 'TIFF files may contain embedded metadata. If processing images from clinical or regulated environments, strip metadata before sharing outputs.'
